description: Notarize-only record of the platform's DSA Art.24(5) submission of a statement of reasons to the EU DSA Transparency Database — THE DOWNSTREAM REGULATORY SEAM. This is the inverse of the upstream SoR-seam (payer/screening/dispute): instead of reading a verdict FROM an external system, AGLedger notarizes a submission TO a real external regulator and BINDS its returned receipt. `submissionPayloadHash` is sha256 of the exact canonicalized JSON POSTed to the DSA DB (POST /api/v1/statement); `dsaUuid` + `dsaPermalink` are the regulator's 201-response receipt. Together they make 'did the platform actually report this decision to the regulator, with these exact reasons, and here is the regulator's proof of receipt' offline-verifiable. `puid` is the platform's own unique id correlating the submission to the enforcement decision. The recipe submits the REAL DSA schema, whose authoritative enums + payload shape are public at the DSA DB's own API docs (https://transparency.dsa.ec.europa.eu/page/api-documentation); the enum KEYS are fully prefixed (e.g. DECISION_GROUND_ILLEGAL_CONTENT, DECISION_VISIBILITY_CONTENT_REMOVED, CONTENT_TYPE_TEXT, SOURCE_ARTICLE_16) and automated_detection is the literal Yes/No. Whether the 201 comes from a live self-hosted DSA instance or the endpoint is doc-grounded + env-configurable is a deployment choice — the receipt fields are bound either way (left empty when not driven live, with submissionStatus=pending). AGLedger does not re-validate the DSA schema server-side; the DSA DB remains the authority on acceptance.

enforcementRef.description: recordId of the enforcement-decision-v1 being reported (chain lineage).

statementRef.description: Optional recordId of the statement-of-reasons-issued-v1 — the user-facing statement whose reasons should match this submission.

puid.description: DSA puid (platform unique id) for this decision — alphanumeric/hyphen/underscore, the platform's own correlation key in the Transparency DB.

submissionPayloadHash.description: sha256:<hex> of the exact canonicalized JSON body POSTed to the DSA Transparency DB. Binds the on-chain record to the precise bytes the regulator received.

submissionStatus.description: pending: prepared, not yet sent (or endpoint doc-grounded). submitted: the DSA DB returned 201 (dsaUuid/dsaPermalink present). rejected: the DSA DB rejected the payload (rejectionDetail present).

submissionMode.description: Optional: DSA single (/api/v1/statement) vs bulk (/api/v1/statements) submission endpoint used.

dsaUuid.description: The DSA Transparency DB's returned statement uuid (the receipt). Present when submissionStatus=submitted.

dsaPermalink.description: The DSA Transparency DB's returned public permalink to the statement. Present when submissionStatus=submitted.

rejectionDetail.description: The DSA DB's rejection reason, verbatim, when submissionStatus=rejected.

submittedAt.description: Optional: when the submission was POSTed to the DSA DB.
